_note:
Demo Mode shape for /api/generate-variants. Aligned with Hokuto taxonomy.
Groups: 2 variants share 'revealing' CM, 1 'story-base-movie', 1 'kids-view', 1 Frankenstein.

variants.hook_text: Sitting 8 hours a day? Your lymph is screaming and your doctor won't tell you.
variants.ae_brief: Energetic female trainer, 35, gym setting, direct camera. Quick cuts: office chair → swollen ankles → lymph diagram animation. Punchy text overlay on 'screaming'.

variants.hook_text: Most physicians miss the lymph blockage in their patients' shoulders.
variants.ae_brief: Woman 40-50, white coat, clinical setting, soft window light. Direct camera gaze, slight lean-in on 'miss'. Calm clinical tone with subtle urgency.

variants.hook_text: My mom carried this for 30 years before someone finally explained why.
variants.ae_brief: Daughter 35 + mother 65 sitting together at kitchen table, daughter slowly explains while mother listens. Warm afternoon light. Slow story-style cuts. Family photos visible as B-roll.

variants.hook_text: My daughter pointed at my neck and asked why I have a 'bump'.
variants.ae_brief: Woman 35-40, bedroom mirror, selfie-cam angle, soft morning light. Handheld camera. No phone visible in frame. Authentic candid moment.

variants.hook_text: I asked my mom why she had this hump. Her own doctor never mentioned it. Until I found this.
variants.ae_brief: MIX-AND-MATCH: Opens UGC selfie style (daughter, 30, kitchen) saying first sentence → cut to clinical mid-shot of mother + doctor for second sentence → cut to UGC reveal for third. Three-shot story arc in 8s. Different lighting per cut: warm kitchen → cool clinic → bright bathroom mirror.
